name: Javelin of Lightning
description:
Each time you make an attack roll with this magic weapon and hit, you can have it deal Lightning damage instead of Piercing damage.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Lightning Bolt", "entries": ["When you throw this weapon at a target no farther than 120 feet from you, you can forgo making a ranged attack roll and instead turn the weapon into a bolt of lightning.
